title: Tegrat
content:
{{Top|ga|ncl}} {{Unlicensed}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Tegrat |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Tegrat system/Legends|Tegrat system]] |sector=[[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]] |system=[[Tegrat system/Legends|Tegrat system]]{{ChallengeCite|46|Imperial Research Station 13 (article)}} |coordinates=J-18''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Tegrat system/Legends|Tegrat system]] |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=A [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Just can the wisecracks and pay attention to that starboard repulsorlift. It's been running kinda spotty.''"
"''I've got a bad feeling about this trip.''"
"''Yeah? Well maybe you'd rather wait around for the Imperials to land?''"
"''Point taken. I'll pay attention to the starboard repulsorlift.|The captain of the ''Sidewinder'' and a passenger|}} '''Tegrat''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] launched an [[Invasion of the Tegrat system|invasion]] of Tegrat's [[Tegrat system/Legends|star system]], causing numerous inhabitants of the planet to rush toward the local [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and many [[Starship/Legends|starships]] fleeing Tegrat. Among the vessels that hastily left Tegrat was the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Sidewinder]]'', aboard which several individuals had booked passage to the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. ==Description== Tegrat was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tegrat system/Legends|Tegrat system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Koradin sector/Legends|Koradin sector]]. It was situated at a distance of more than three [[Standard day/Legends|days']] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel from the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] of the Outer Rim's [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==History== {{RPG| "[[Imperial Research Station 13 (article)|Imperial Research Station 13]]"}} [[File:Koradin_sector.jpg|thumb|right|300px|The Galactic Empire targeted Tegrat, which was located in the Koradin sector, and its galactic neighborhood in its efforts to eradicate Rebel Alliance activity.]] At one point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], several individuals were on Tegrat while independently seeking transportation offworld. All of them eventually booked passage with the [[Unidentified captain (Sidewinder)|captain]] of the [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] ''[[Sidewinder]]'', which was carrying cargo to Tatooine, with the departure scheduled to take place just after the local [[Local day/Legends|noon]]. However, mere [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] later, news reports revealed that [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] of the Empire had arrived in the Tegrat [[Star system/Legends|system]] and were approaching the planet as part of an Imperial [[Invasion of the Tegrat system|invasion]] of the system that in turn constituted a part of a wider effort by that government to eliminate Rebel activity in that area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Throngs of people, the group of individuals included, then began racing toward the local [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], from which numerous [[Starship/Legends|starships]] lifted off ahead of their schedules in order for the various residents of Tegrat to escape Imperial subjugation. After the crew and passengers of the ''Sidewinder'' hastily boarded the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], its [[Captain/Legends|captain]] briefly notified the local spaceport's control tower—which, in the general confusion, did not acknowledge the message—and traveled toward the hyperspace jump point. There, after fighting off a number of Imperial [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]], the ''Sidewinder'' ultimately jumped into hyperspace. {{Endgame}} ==Locations== A spaceport with a control tower was located on Tegrat. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Challenge_46.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Tegrat was introduced in ''Challenge'' 46.]] Tegrat appeared in the [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure "[[Imperial Research Station 13 (article)|Imperial Research Station 13]]," written by [[Lester W. Smith]] and published in the [[October]]–[[November]] [[1990]] [[Challenge 46|forty-sixth issue]] of the [[Challenge (magazine)|''Challenge'']] magazine for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Since that adventure was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process, it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.{{UnlicensedStatus}} The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tegrat system, and therefore the planet itself, in grid square J-18. "Imperial Research Station 13" suggests that the light freighter ''Sidewinder'' departs Tegrat while its captain is relatively unfamiliar with his new [[Pilot/Legends|copilot]]. One explanation for this offered by the adventure is that the starship's previous copilot simply failed to arrive in [[Time/Legends|time]] for the rushed take-off. In that case, as suggested by the adventure, the captain fully intends to return to Tegrat for them after the Imperial attention has shifted away from the planet again—presumably in a matter of a [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]]. ==Appearances== {{Indexpage}} ===Non-canon appearances=== *{{ChallengeCite|46|Imperial Research Station 13 (article)}} {{1st}} {{Un}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Tegrat }} [[Category:Koradin sector locations]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
